item.title:
Mike_kim714: Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 23h 500k followers giveaway pt 1!

Comment, lik
item.description:
Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 23h 500k followers giveaway pt 1!
My golf bag plus some @Titleist goodies
Comment, like, repost to enter. Must be a follower
Clubs not included unfortunately* Still need those for my day job 8 mil 9 mil 17 mil 818 mil

Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 23min En respuesta a @Mike_kim714 Winner is @michaelfordgolf !!!
Another giveaway coming after this week! 3 22 4 mil

item.title: NoLayingUp: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 31min Resisting the urge to go through bookmarked tweets No se pudo reproducir el contenido m
item.description: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 31min Resisting the urge to go through bookmarked tweets No se pudo reproducir el contenido multimedia. Recargar 10 8 259 22 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 54min Big tournament in Mexico this week so some notes on Tulum Championship. Accuracy was key
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 54min Big tournament in Mexico this week so some notes on Tulum Championship. Accuracy was key last year. Player ranked 1st in DA for season led thru 54; Nimmer won, is accurate. Ditto all of the top 7. Scoring tough. Best form guides Boise and Panama, latter especially as most recent. 2 6 5 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 47min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf Then it was veteran fairway-finders, landed on Reavie & Du
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 47min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf Then it was veteran fairway-finders, landed on Reavie & Duncan over Blair. Latter ties this w/ Panama; Reavie seems to have turned corner the last two. Boise form runs through a lot of these (Sigg/Duncan especially). Go steady, KFT very competitive and some of these speculative. 2 1 1 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 44min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf Final tweet should read Blaum, not Blair. I was put off by
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 44min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf Final tweet should read Blaum, not Blair. I was put off by how much he relied on putting in Florida last time but had a nice profile for this in some ways and played well last year. Sigg, Bacha, VanA and Buckley the sensible ones, anyway. Weakish field with the Ians off. 1 mil

item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 1h LIV Golf Career Money List
(Reminder, it started in 2022)
1. $87.7m: Jon Rahm 2.
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 1h LIV Golf Career Money List
(Reminder, it started in 2022)
1. $87.7m: Jon Rahm 2. $71.6m: Joaquin Niemann 3. $68.7m: Talor Gooch 4. $64.1m: Dustin Johnson 5. $58.4m: Bryson DeChambeau 6. $50.9m: Cam Smith 7. $46.4m: Sergio Garcia 8. $44.7m: Brooks Mostrar más 13 14 127 59 mil
